sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1
view_title: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1 (มุม 2)
grid_source: mk_test/t3/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json

element.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile with a two-panel window near the top-center and a mirror strip on the left; overall wall height 2.70 m, tile/fixture zone height 2.00 m (same 0.60+0.20+0.20+1.00 breakdown pattern as view 1)
Two-panel window (hexagon callout '3', matching W3 'บานกระทุ้ง' on the door/window schedule หน้า10) set into the top-center of the wall, above the mirror/basin zone
Wall-hung wash basin below the mirror
Toilet (WC.1), lower right of elevation, labeled 'ห้องน้ำ 1'
Towel rail (TR.), upper right of elevation
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.50[2]' under this elevation (ห้องน้ำ 1 zone)
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 0.10 + 0.90 + 0.90 + 0.10 = 2.00 m total
Circled 'B' grid marker below the left edge of this elevation
Circled 'C' grid marker below the right edge of this elevation

warnings: Sibling view to _หน้า12_wc1_section1.json — this file covers the right-hand elevation ('2') of the same A-10 sheet, showing the window wall of WC.1.

Unlike the R1/R2 eave details on หน้า14 (where the axis letters turned out to be local/non-grid), the 'B' and 'C' letters here plausibly ARE the real building gridlines B and C, since the WC.1 room was already noted as sitting between gridB and gridC on the floor plan sheet (หน้า11/หน้า06) — kept at moderate confidence rather than high because this sheet alone doesn't prove it, and this reviewer did not cross-check against a structural S-series sheet in this pass.
The 0.10+0.90+0.90+0.10=2.00 m width chain matches the WC.1 room's 2.00 m depth dimension read independently on the plan sheet (หน้า11) — cross-consistent.
First-time read of this sheet (A-10) — not present in mk_test/t1 or t2.
